license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7fkhjkw
title: Microplate reader operating procedure
author: 宏亮 董

steps_raw.instruction: Turn on the power and warm up for 10 minutes.
Open the program and select "New" to create a new process.
Select "Absorbance" in the left column. There is a schematic of a 96-well plate in the middle of the screen.
You can select the hole to be used according to the spotting hole, and the selected hole will turn blue.
Put in the 96-well plate, set the parameters, click "start" to measure the absorbance, and then remove the 96-well plate.
Wait a moment, it will generate an Excel file with results and various parameters. Save and copy the file to the u disk and process the data.
